questions.question: Explain the difference between OSI model and TCP/IP model. Provide one advantage of each model.
questions.hint: Describe the OSI and TCP/IP models in detail, focusing on their structure

questions.question: What is the main function of the Physical Layer in the OSI model? Provide one example of a physical layer device.
questions.hint: Describe the functions of each layer in the OSI model, focusing on the Physical Layer

questions.question: State the difference between a network and a link in the context of network models. Provide one scenario where a network and a link can be the same thing.
questions.hint: Explain the concepts of network and link in depth, focusing on their differences
